home.flowIntro: Walk through the steps to review your card's status.

intro.description: We will walk you through the details of your financial product in a few steps.

details.description: Review the information linked to your card before seeing its final status.
details.cardPickerTitle: Pick a card to see its status

status.fallback: No card has been selected yet to show its status.

stepper.finishHint: Closes the flow after reviewing the card status
stepper.indicatorHint: Shows user progress through the flow
stepper.cardPickerLabel: List of cards to choose from
stepper.selectCardHint: Select this card to continue to the final status
stepper.cardCarouselHint: Swipe sideways or tap a card to select it

card.actionsLabel: Actions to change the card status

actionHint.disabled: Blocks the card for any future operation
actionHint.unpaused: Reactivates the card after a pause

card.actionDisabledHint: This transition is not available from the current status
